description: Issue/PR -> context compile -> review agent emits typed review-findings artifact -> human acknowledges. Contract pin for the governed_review benchmark (docs/BENCHMARK-SUITE.md §2). B0 ships only the workflow definition; the runtime (adapter dispatch, review-findings artifact materialisation via adapter_invoker output_parse walker, benchmark scoring) lands in FAZ-B PR-B6. expected_adapter_refs declares 'codex-stub' as a placeholder — workspaces that run the review flow will point it at a real review-capable adapter whose manifest declares review_findings in capabilities[] and carries an output_parse rule pointing at review-findings.schema.v1.json.
